user_system_path: The product is amnesiac for the USER, not just its agents (#592): the dismissal loop was one-way (1,204 skips, 93% no feedback_weight, 0% outcome_closed ever). Wired the existing-but-unwired rails: one-tap Slack reason capture (not_now/never/wrong_framing/already_done) -> always-populated skip_reason + feedback_weight on tkg_actions -> a scorer judgment-suppression multiplier that demotes (never hard-drops) future candidates sharing the dismissed mechanism/topic. No migration; rides execution_result JSONB.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence lib/cron lib/conviction lib/slack app/api/slack app/api/conviction (1416 green)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): tap each of the 4 one-tap dismissal-reason options on a real #foldera-self-loop card; confirm the tkg_actions row gets skip_reason/feedback_weight/execution_result.dismissal, and a later similar candidate is visibly demoted (not missing) in scorer diagnostics.
browser_proof_command: manual: trigger a heartbeat, dismiss a real card via the new overflow menu with each reason, confirm the row update and the next scoring run's judgmentSuppressionApplied diagnostics for 2cbc1bab.
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + vitest green (1416) + PR merged + live dismissal-reason capture + demotion verified for 2cbc1bab.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
vitest green (lib/briefing + lib/workday-presence + lib/conviction + lib/slack + app/api/slack)
legacy plain Dismiss button (no overflow) still resolves exactly as before — explicit regression test in app/api/slack/interaction/__tests__/route.test.ts
judgment suppression only ever demotes (multiplier > 0); never a hard filter/drop
no loosening of any existing quality gate; no auto-send
stop_condition: PR opened, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED_WITH_REASON pending owner live verification of the one-tap dismissal-reason capture + judgment-suppression demotion on a real Slack card.
next_command: Owner live-verifies #592's dismissal-reason capture in #foldera-self-loop. Follow-up (separate seam): outcome_closed loop-closing. Unrelated/parallel: PR #591 (#589 card-brevity) still needs an owner merge decision.
